messages.content:
# Medical Equipment Inspection Checklist

Equipment ID: 0CTAMI2I  
Model: O'Hara LLC mNYv  
Department: Operating Room  
Inspection Date: 2025-02-13  
Inspector: Marcos Buckridge  

## Physical Condition

| Checkpoint               | Functional | Needs Service | Defective | Not Applicable | Notes                                      |
|--------------------------|------------|---------------|-----------|----------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Equipment housing intact |            | ☑             |           |                | Backup system needs verification. Last checked on 2/12/2025 |
| Display screen clear     |            |               | ☑         |                | Critical error in self-diagnostic          |
| Control buttons functional | ☑        |               |           |                |                                            |
| Power cord undamaged     |            |               |           | -              |                                            |
| Mounting brackets secure |            | ☑             |           |                | Battery backup needs testing               |
| Wheels/casters condition | ☑          |               |           |                |                                            |
| Labels and markings legible | ☑      |               |           |                |                                            |
| Accessories complete     |            |               |           | -              |                                            |
